title: text_emitted fires for assistant text with the turn it came from
description: text_emitted MUST appear when the model produces text content in a turn. It carries `step` matching the turn. The exact text comes from the live model, so this case matches the event shape + step only — scripted harnesses get deterministic content via scripted_model.text but the assertion stays robust to live model variation. Order constraint: text_emitted MUST come after model_turn_ended (turn boundaries close before content emission, per trajectory.md §7).

commission.prompt: Reply with one short sentence. Do not call any tools.

events.label: text_emitted fires after some model_turn_ended (step depends on whether the live model used extended thinking)
